use_cases: Interactive product cards that respond to mouse movement with 3D rotation
Feature showcase cards with depth perception effects for enhanced engagement
Testimonial cards with immersive hover interactions for improved retention
Portfolio items with dimensional card effects for creative presentations
Pricing cards with engaging 3D visual feedback to highlight value propositions
ai_summary: A 3D card component that rotates in response to mouse movement using CSS transforms with perspective. The card tracks cursor position to apply dynamic rotation on both X and Y axes, creating an immersive depth effect. Features React context for state management and smooth transitions with transform-style preservation.
